content.full_text:
February 15, 2005

Susan Henry
8565 Whitefish Circle
Fountain Valley, CA 92708

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-208

Dear Ms. Henry:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Pursuant to our February 14, 2005, phone conversation, your request is withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Counsel, Legal Division

NB:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-208

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
